prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该校在甘肃理科/物理类最低位次分别为6186→5796→3338→→11411，整体呈现先升后降的大幅波动。2023年位次异常前移（3338名 ），2025年因新高考改革分专业组投档，生物技术等专业组拉低校线至11411名，较2023年后移约8073名。2025年基准位次约11411名；2021年计划30人，2022–2 025年均为24人，近年计划稳定。，按计划持平处理。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，军队院校，软科主榜未进入前200名（ 军事类院校不参与排名），学校层次较高，对考生有较强吸引力；未见明显投档断档记 录；第五轮学科评估数据未收录该校（军事类院校），但该校临床医学、口腔医学、基础医学、药学、生物医学工程等专业实力突出，在军内外享有较高声誉。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校位于陕西西安，与甘肃相邻，属于西北地区，对 甘肃考生有较强的地域吸引力。该校在甘肃招生人数占比较小（2025年约24人），招生规模稳定；临床医学、口腔医学等医学类专业社会热度持续高热，报考竞争激烈。甘肃省2026年普通高考总人数218700人，按近年物理类占比约67.7%估算，物理类 考生约148000人，较2025年121443人增长约22%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次11411名、招生计划持平、甘肃省物理类 考生大幅增长约22%导致竞争加剧、医学类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年该校最低录取位次将小幅后移。预测最低位次约11600名，区间11200–12000名。

- 临床医学（8年制/5年制）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间11200–12000名以内，建议以二档专业为主、一档王牌专业（口腔/临床）冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如11000名以内）可重点冲刺口腔医学和 临床医学等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings of this university in Gansu Science/Physics Category were 6186 → 5796 → 3338 → → 11411, showing a large fluctuation of first rising then falling. In 2023, the ranking abnormally moved forward (3338th place). In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform with major group filing, major groups such as Biotechnology lowered the school line to 11411th place, moving back about 8073 places compared to 2023. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 11411th place; the enrollment plan was 30 people in 2021, and 24 people each year from 2022 to 2025, with a stable plan in recent years. It is treated as a constant plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, a military academy, not ranked in the top 200 on the Soft Science main list (military academies do not participate in rankings). The school level is relatively high, with strong appeal to candidates; no obvious filing gaps recorded; the fifth round of discipline evaluation data is not included for this university (military academy), but its clinical medicine, stomatology, basic medicine, pharmacy, biomedical engineering and other majors are outstanding, enjoying a high reputation both inside and outside the military.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, adjacent to Gansu, belonging to the northwest region, it has strong regional appeal to Gansu candidates. The number of students enrolled in Gansu accounts for a small proportion (about 24 people in 2025), with a stable enrollment scale; medical majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology continue to have high social popularity, with fierce competition for admission. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Gansu Province general college entrance examination is 218,700. Estimated based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 67.7%, the number of Physics Category candidates is about 148,000, an increase of about 22% compared to 121,443 in 2025, with the expansion of candidate scale intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 11411th place, a constant enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 22% in Gansu Physics Category candidates leading to intensified competition, and the continued high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for this university in 2026 will slightly move back. The predicted minimum ranking is about 11600th place, with a range of 11200–12000th place.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11200–12000, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 flagship majors (Stomatology/Clinical Medicine) as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11000), you can focus on reaching for flagship majors such as Stomatology and Clinical Medicine.
